shadowDomPanel.title: UI Architecture: Shadow DOM & Style Isolation
shadowDomPanel.description: A Shadow DOM based encapsulation strategy to prevent host page CSS from leaking into the extension UI.

style.title: Style isolation
style.desc: Host CSS can't pierce the Shadow Tree

event.title: Event isolation
event.desc: Prevent host hotkeys from interfering with input

shadowDomPanel.styleInjectionDesc: Inject <style> inside shadowRoot to avoid host CSS pollution.
shadowDomPanel.reactPortalDesc: Assistant selector is built with native DOM (lighter).

injection.sidePanelDesc: Standalone side panel UI, fully isolated
injection.offscreenDesc: Hidden background capability host, not a user-facing entry
